task_description: Complete rewrite of the admin scoring panel with professional CricHeroes/Cricbuzz-style ball-by-ball live scoring. Includes new ball_by_ball SQL table, dedicated scoring repository and state management, professional UI with quick scoring buttons, extras, wickets, and advanced actions. Fantasy points auto-update on every ball.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY). Applied review fixes: (1) overs rate calculations now use legalBalls/6.0 while display keeps /10 convention, (2) fantasy points use incremental delta via fetch-then-add, (3) undo recalculates per-player stats from remaining balls and updates scoreboard/fantasy, (4) strike rotation uses scorer ID captured before swap, (5) RLS policies added to ball_by_ball, (6) bye/leg-bye now show additional runs dialog, (7) over-end popup has double-fire guard, (8) rapid tap concurrency guard via _isBusy flag. All files structurally verified (balanced braces, valid imports).
